text:
Per session: a scope + five per-field **inputs** (`working`, `title`, `activity`, `channels`, `arm`) → a derived **`StatusContent`** node (ports `status_for`/`status_from_session` exactly: `busy=working`, idle clears the live activity, title always survives, archived-excluded h-tags) → a single-entry **`map_collection<session_id, StatusValue>`** (`{content, static info, arm}`) → a **`map_resource_planner`** over `ResourceKey::from_segments(["status", session_id])`:
- added → `Open` (`Publish{Opened}`)
- content changed → `Replace` (`Publish{Changed}`)
- **only `arm` advanced** → `Refresh` (`Publish{Refreshed}`) — the distinct TTL-refresh reason
- scope close → `Close` → host builds the final `Expire`
